attributes.action: Not banned social media for under 16
attributes.additional_details: This should be a vote with the people of the uk and not decided by one person
attributes.background: Because people should have freedom and not be controlled by the government

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Do not ban social media for under 16s
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757233
